style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="被告人是否使用工具？/<br>Did the defendant use tools?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="80" x="-280" y="282.36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ZgPRvvEJWerZVniJifaD-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=#0e8088;" value="公诉机关指控：被告人周于2015年5月29日20时许，在北京市朝阳区平房乡福盈家园4号院岗亭前，因琐事与被害人时建朝发生纠纷后，持砖头殴打被害人时建朝肩、胸部，致被害人时建朝多发肋骨骨折。经刑事科学技术鉴定属轻伤一级被告人周后被民警抓获归案公诉机关认为被告人己赔偿被害人经济损失，建议判处被告人周有期徒刑六个月至一年。/<br>The public prosecution charges: At around 20:00 on May 29, 2015, the defendant Zhou was in front of the sentry box in the No.4 yard of Fuyingjiayuan, Pingfang Town, Chaoyang District, Beijing. After a dispute with the victim Shi Jianchao over trifles, he beat the victim Shi Jianchao shoulder and chest with a brick, resulting in multiple rib fractures of the victim Shi Jianchao. After the criminal science and technology identification, the defendant was caught by the police and brought to justice. The public prosecution organ believed that the defendant had compensated for the economic loss of the victim and recommended that the defendant be sentenced to six months to one year in prison." div.div:
公诉机关指控：被告人周于2015年5月29日20时许，在北京市朝阳区平房乡福盈家园4号院岗亭前，因琐事与被害人时建朝发生纠纷后，持砖头殴打被害人时建朝肩、胸部，致被害人时建朝多发肋骨骨折。经刑事科学技术鉴定属轻伤一级被告人周后被民警抓获归案公诉机关认为被告人己赔偿被害人经济损失，建议判处被告人周有期徒刑六个月至一年。/
The public prosecution charges: At around 20:00 on May 29, 2015, the defendant Zhou was in front of the sentry box in the No.4 yard of Fuyingjiayuan, Pingfang Town, Chaoyang District, Beijing. After a dispute with the victim Shi Jianchao over trifles, he beat the victim Shi Jianchao shoulder and chest with a brick, resulting in multiple rib fractures of the victim Shi Jianchao. After the criminal science and technology identification, the defendant was caught by the police and brought to justice. The public prosecution organ believed that the defendant had compensated for the economic loss of the victim and recommended that the defendant be sentenced to six months to one year in prison.
